body:
## Problem

Issue #1332 (untriaged) adds links from **articles → drummer profiles**. This proposal adds the reverse: **drummer profiles → related articles**.

Currently, drummer profile pages don't link to their corresponding kit articles (e.g., Joey Jordison's profile doesn't link to `/articles/painkiller-drum-setup`). The articles sit as orphans from the profile perspective.

## Opportunity

Drummer profiles are the highest-traffic pages (Joey Jordison, /drummer/2, consistently #2 in GA4). Articles like "/articles/painkiller-drum-setup" and "/articles/and-justice-for-all-drum-setup" are in the GA4 top-10 but get their organic traffic independently. Bidirectional links = PageRank flow in both directions.

## Data Shape

The `ALBUM_ARTICLES` array in `data/articles.js` (or equivalent) already has a `relatedDrummers` field (or `drummer` slug). Use it to build the reverse lookup.

## Implementation

In `packages/frontend/App.js` (DrummerDetail component), after the existing "Related Drummers" block:

```javascript
// Build article backlinks
const relatedArticles = ALBUM_ARTICLES.filter(a =>
  a.relatedDrummers?.includes(drummer.slug) || a.drummer === drummer.slug
).slice(0, 3);

if (relatedArticles.length > 0) {
  // Render a "Related Articles" section with links:
  // "Painkiller Drum Setup" → /articles/painkiller-drum-setup
}
```

**Section design:**
- Heading: "Gear Deep Dives & Articles"
- Show up to 3 articles with title + short description
- Crawler-accessible `<a href>` links (not JS-only)

## Files to Touch

- `packages/frontend/App.js` — DrummerDetail component: add Related Articles section
- `packages/frontend/data/articles.js` — verify `relatedDrummers` field exists and is populated (if not, add it for the top-10 most-linked drummers: Joey Jordison, Lars Ulrich, Dave Lombardo, etc.)

## Quality Gate

- `curl -s https://metalforge.io/drummer/joey-jordison` → page HTML contains `<a href="/articles/painkiller-drum-setup"`
- At least 5 drummer profiles have ≥1 linked article
- All article links are standard `<a href>` (crawler-visible, not JS-dynamically-rendered without SSR)

## Estimated Uplift

Passes PageRank from drummer profiles (high DA, organic traffic) to articles (lower initial authority). Compounds with #1332 (article → profile links) to create a bidirectional link graph. Mirrors the proven "Related Drummers" internal-link block (#1005–#1007) which shipped and confirmed the pattern.

## Done

- [ ] DrummerDetail shows "Related Articles" section with ≥1 article where data exists
- [ ] All article links are crawler-visible `<a href>`
- [ ] At least 5 high-traffic drummer profiles linked to at least 1 article
- [ ] relatedDrummers backlink data populated for top articles
title: SEO: Drummer profile pages → related articles internal links — reverse of #1332 (bidirectional PageRank)
